name: Regex101
description: The best online regex tester and debugger. Supports PCRE, JavaScript, Python, and Go. Real-time match highlighting with detailed explanations.

name: Squoosh
description: Google's browser-based image compression tool. Resize and convert images to WebP, AVIF, JPEG XL, and more with side-by-side comparison.

name: CyberChef
description: GCHQ's web app for encoding, decoding, encryption, and data analysis. Chain hundreds of operations like a recipe — a hacker's Swiss Army knife.

name: Excalidraw
description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn-style diagrams. Perfect for wireframes, architecture diagrams, and quick brainstorming sessions.

name: TinyWow
description: Free online toolkit with 100+ tools for PDFs, images, videos, and text. Convert, compress, merge, edit — no signup required.

name: JSONFormatter
description: Instantly format, validate, and minify JSON. Supports multiple JSON specs and highlights syntax errors with helpful messages.

name: Carbon
description: Create gorgeous images of your source code. Supports 100+ languages, tons of themes, and custom backgrounds. Perfect for social sharing.

name: Bundlephobia
description: Find the cost of adding a npm package to your bundle. Shows minified + gzipped size, download time, and composition breakdown.

name: Crontab Guru
description: The quickest way to decode or build a cron schedule expression. Paste any cron string and get a plain-English description instantly.

name: SmallDev.tools
description: Handy collection of free developer mini-tools: encoders, formatters, generators, testers. Fast and ad-minimal.

name: Epoch Converter
description: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa. Also handles batch conversion, relative time, and timezone offsets.

name: ScreenToGif
description: Windows tool to record your screen, webcam, or sketchboard and export as GIF, MP4, or WebM. Free and open-source.

name: Whois Lookup
description: Look up domain ownership, registration dates, nameservers, and contact information for any domain name.

name: SSL Checker
description: Verify SSL certificate installation, expiry date, and chain of trust for any domain. Instant results.

name: DNS Checker
description: Check DNS propagation across 22+ global servers. Verify if DNS changes have propagated worldwide in real time.

name: Responsively
description: Browser DevTool that shows your site on multiple screen sizes simultaneously. Speeds up responsive web design.

name: Meta Tags
description: Preview and generate meta tags for your site. See exactly how your page appears on Google, Twitter, Facebook, and more.
